title: meliosma chiriquensis
intro: Meliosma chiriquensis, also known as the Chiriqui meliosma or Chiriqui tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sabiaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Central America, particularly in Panama and Costa Rica. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help to treat various health conditions, such as fever, colds, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Meliosma chiriquensis can be made into teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to promote health and well-being, and to support the immune system.
